stemHtml: Per Part-FCL, a CPL(A) applicant (without IR) shall have completed at least...

options.a: 15 hours instrument time, max 5 hours PIC.
options.b: 20 hours instrument instruction, max 10 hours ground time.
options.c: 10 hours instrument instruction, max 5 hours ground time.
options.d: 20 hours instrument instruction, max 5 hours ground time.
